pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent from 2.6.2 to 3.3.4 to support Java 21 and modern Spring ecosystem.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21; upgrading to 3.x is required for JDK 21 compatibility.

pom.xml.general_idea: Set the target Java version property to 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Maven compiler plugin needs to target Java 21 to compile code using Java 21 features or run on JDK 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace deprecated springfox dependencies with springdoc-openapi for Spring Boot 3 compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: Springfox is incompatible with Spring Boot 3 (Jakarta EE namespace changes); springdoc is the required replacement.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add explicit dependency for javax.validation API to replace implicit transitive dependency removed in Spring Boot 3.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 moves to Jakarta EE; javax.validation classes are no longer available by default, causing compile errors if referenced.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade spring-cloud-gateway-mvc to version 4.1.3 compatible with Spring Boot 3.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Cloud 2021.x (compatible with Boot 2.6) is incompatible with Spring Boot 3; requires Spring Cloud 2023.x (4.x).

pom.xml.general_idea: Add awaitility dependency for testing async jobs.
Add spring-security-config dependency to manage security context in async threads.
Add opencsv dependency for CSV processing.
Update frontend Node.js version from 12 to 16.
Add pitest-maven plugin for mutation testing.
Add git-code-format-maven-plugin for code formatting validation.
Add git-commit-id-maven-plugin to generate git properties.
Update JaCoCo plugin configuration to exclude new package paths and add coverage rules.
Rename project artifact and name from kitchensink to courses.

.gitignore.general_idea: Add .DS_Store to .gitignore to prevent macOS metadata files from being tracked.
Add frontend/strykerTmp to .gitignore to exclude Stryker mutation testing temporary files.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Switch the base image from a Maven-bundled JDK 11 image to a standalone Liberica JDK 21 Alpine image to support Java 21.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The application code has been migrated to Java 21; running it on JDK 11 results in runtime errors due to missing APIs or bytecode incompatibility.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Replace apt-get with apk to align with the new Alpine Linux base image.
Dockerfile.why_exists: Alpine Linux uses apk, not apt-get; using apt-get causes a command not found error during build.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Upgrade Node.js installation from version 12 to version 20 to match modern frontend tooling requirements.
Explicitly install Maven via apk since the new base image does not include it.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The build step requires mvn to compile the project; without this installation, the build fails with 'command not found'.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Install libstdc++ to satisfy native library dependencies required by the application or its dependencies on Alpine.
Dockerfile.why_exists: Missing native libraries cause UnsatisfiedLinkError or similar runtime failures when the application starts.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Install git to support build-time operations that require version control information.
Dockerfile.why_exists: Build plugins or scripts may fail if git is not available to read repository metadata.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Switch from NodeSource script to nvm for installing Node.js, providing better version management on Alpine.
Remove the Heroku CLI installation as it is no longer needed in the Docker image.
Change the container entrypoint from a generic bash shell to executing the compiled Java JAR file.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The container must run the application; starting a bash shell does not launch the service, causing the app to be unreachable.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Change the copy strategy to include the entire directory (including .git) to support build-time git metadata retrieval.
Set PRODUCTION=true environment variable to configure the application for production mode.

dev_environment.general_idea: Rename the Docker image identifier to reflect a change in project naming or purpose.

frontend/.eslintrc.json.general_idea: Added 'react-app/jest' to the extends array to enable Jest-specific linting rules provided by Create React App.
Added the 'testing-library/no-node-access' rule set to 'off' to suppress warnings about direct DOM node access in tests.

frontend/.gitignore.general_idea: Add storybook.log to .gitignore to prevent logging files from being tracked in version control.

frontend/.storybook/main.js.general_idea: Refactor Storybook main.js from CommonJS module.exports to ES Module export default with typed config object.
Update glob patterns for stories to match Storybook 8 conventions (removing .mdx specific pattern, adding mjs).
Explicitly define the Storybook framework configuration for react-webpack5.
Configure static directories to serve public assets in Storybook.
Remove custom webpack plugin that failed builds on warnings, likely due to incompatibility or changed build strategy.
frontend/.storybook/main.js.before: webpackFinal: async (config) => { config.plugins.push(new WebpackPluginFailBuildOnWarning()); return config; }

frontend/.storybook/main.js.general_idea: Add the onboarding addon for Storybook.
Add the Chromatic addon for visual testing.
Add the interactions addon for testing user interactions.
Add the remix-react-router addon for routing support in stories.
Add the queryparams addon for managing URL query parameters in stories.

frontend/.storybook/preview.js.general_idea: Add import for react-toastify CSS to support toast notifications in Storybook.
Add imports for msw-storybook-addon to enable API mocking in Storybook.
Add imports for react-toastify components and hooks to display navigation warnings.
Add import for useEffect hook to trigger toast notifications on route changes.
Add import for useLocation hook to detect navigation attempts in Storybook.
Initialize MSW (Mock Service Worker) at the top level of the preview configuration.
Refactor decorators to conditionally apply MemoryRouter and show toast warnings for navigation attempts.
Update preview configuration to use Storybook 8 format with default export and new parameters structure.

frontend/package.json.general_idea: Enforce Node.js v20.17.0 to align with the backend Java 21 migration and modern frontend tooling requirements.
frontend/package.json.why_exists: Without this, the project may run on incompatible Node versions (e.g., Node 14/16) that lack support for modern ESM features or dependencies required by React 18/Storybook 8, leading to runtime crashes or build failures.

frontend/package.json.general_idea: Migrate React and ReactDOM from version 17 to 18 to support modern concurrency features and compatibility with newer libraries.
frontend/package.json.why_exists: React 18 introduces a new root API (`createRoot`) and changes to batching; code relying on `ReactDOM.render` will fail at runtime, and many modern UI libraries (like Storybook 8) require React 18+.

frontend/package.json.general_idea: Update Create React App's react-scripts from v4 to v5 to support React 18 and modern Webpack 5 features.
frontend/package.json.why_exists: react-scripts v4 does not support React 18's new root API and uses Webpack 4, which is incompatible with many modern dependencies and Node 20.

frontend/package.json.general_idea: Migrate Storybook from v6 to v8 to align with React 18 and modern development workflows.
frontend/package.json.why_exists: Storybook v6 is incompatible with React 18 and Node 20; attempting to run it will result in build errors or runtime crashes due to deprecated APIs and dependency conflicts.

frontend/package.json.general_idea: Update npm scripts to use Storybook 8 CLI commands (`storybook dev`/`build`) instead of v6 commands (`start-storybook`/`build-storybook`).
frontend/package.json.why_exists: The `start-storybook` command was removed in Storybook 7/8; using it will cause a 'command not found' or module resolution error.

frontend/package.json.general_idea: Configure Jest to map axios to its CommonJS build to resolve ESM/CJS interop issues in testing.
frontend/package.json.why_exists: Axios v1+ is ESM-first; without this mapping, Jest (which runs in CJS mode by default in CRA) will fail to import axios, causing test suite crashes.

frontend/package.json.general_idea: Override react-refresh version to 0.14.2 to resolve compatibility issues with React 18 and Webpack 5.
frontend/package.json.why_exists: Without this override, transitive dependencies may pull in an incompatible version of react-refresh, causing hot-reload failures or build errors in React 18.

frontend/package.json.general_idea: Remove env-cmd dependency and simplify start/build scripts to rely on standard react-scripts environment handling.
Update axios from v0.21 to v1.7 to gain security patches and modern HTTP client features.
Update Bootstrap from beta v5 to stable v5.3.3 for final API stability and bug fixes.
Update @testing-library/react and related packages to support React 18 and modern testing patterns.
Add npm scripts for code formatting using Prettier to enforce consistent code style.
Introduce explicit ESLint configuration in package.json to enforce code quality rules and disable unused React import warnings.
Add Mock Service Worker (MSW) for advanced API mocking in tests and Storybook.
Add npm script to integrate Chromatic for visual regression testing of Storybook stories.
Refactor Jest configuration to use nyc for coverage reporting and adjust thresholds.
Rename the package from 'frontend' to 'proj-courses-frontend' for better identification.
Increment package version from 0.1.0 to 0.2.0 to reflect significant updates.
Add react-hook-form dependency for efficient form handling.
Add recharts dependency for data visualization components.
Add react-toastify for user notification toasts.
Replace react-json-view with react18-json-view for React 18 compatibility.
Add graphql dependency for potential GraphQL API support.
Add react-table as a headless UI library for tables, replacing react-bootstrap-table-next.
Add various Storybook 8 addons for interactions, onboarding, and query params.
Add typescript-eslint for linting TypeScript/JavaScript code with TS-aware rules.
Explicitly add webpack 5 as a dev dependency to ensure compatibility with Storybook 8.

frontend/public/index.html.general_idea: Changed the favicon reference from the default React icon to a custom tower icon.
Added a link to the Font Awesome CSS library via CDN.
Updated the HTML document title from the generic 'React App' to 'Courses'.

frontend/public/manifest.json.generic_idea: Updated the PWA manifest short_name and name from generic React App defaults to the specific application name 'Courses'.
